falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key trendline would invalidate the HOLD signal, indicating a potential bullish trend contrary to the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 50 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 50 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a potential reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX (Volatility Index) drops below 15 for 3 consecutive days within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a sharp decline in volatility would signal market complacency, invalidating the HOLD signal by indicating a potential breakdown in risk-off dynamics.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
